message:
refactor(extras): use ftui-text width functions instead of unicode_width

Replace direct unicode_width crate usage with ftui-text's display_width
and grapheme_width functions across all ftui-extras modules. This aligns
with the same refactoring applied to ftui-widgets.

Files updated:
- console.rs: Use display_width/grapheme_width for buffer and line width
- diagram.rs: Use display_width for node label measurements
- filepicker.rs: Use display_width for file name truncation
- forms.rs: Use display_width for field label alignment
- help/spotlight.rs: Use display_width for search result formatting
- help/tooltip.rs: Use display_width for tooltip text measurement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
